issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing mainly on happy path instructions.
Missing checksum verification for Tailscale package installation via curl in Debian/Ubuntu setup.
Missing checksum verification for Tailscale package installation via curl in Fedora/RHEL setup.

scenarios.name: Subnet router exposing 10.0.0.0/16 from an EC2 box to the tailnet
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows about ip_forward but misses --advertise-routes and route approval, and reaches for unrelated iptables; treatment runs tailscale up --advertise-routes, writes net.ipv4.ip_forward and net.ipv6.conf.all.forwarding to /etc/sysctl.conf with sysctl -p, and approves routes via admin panel/API.

scenarios.name: Fleet provisioning script for 4 prod API servers with tag:prod,tag:api
scenarios.rationale: Baseline loops ssh with interactive tailscale up and leaves tagging manual; treatment POSTs to /api/v2/tailnet/$TAILNET/keys with Authorization: Bearer to mint a reusable tagged auth key and uses tailscale up --authkey --hostname over ssh in parallel.
